title: Long-task session ledger
summary: Decision: use a local JSONL ledger only when long-task facts would drift.

intent.primaryQuestion: Does effective-interact preserve long-task facts before reporting them?
intent.decision: Use a ledger only when it lowers drift risk for later status or HTML reporting.
successCriteria: The ledger path is local and ignored.
Important tool results are summarized, not pasted raw.
Sensitive or oversized data is explicitly excluded.

claims.statement: The session ledger belongs under the ignored skill-local artifacts tree.
Ledger entries should summarize tool output and never store secrets or raw large logs.
knownLimits: The ledger is a fact preservation aid; source evidence still needs commands, files, or assumptions.

sections.title: Usage boundary
sections.content:
- **Use it for long tasks** where checkpoints, data, status, and tool-result summaries may drift.
- **Skip it for short commands** and routine explanations.
- **Never store secrets**, credentials, raw large logs, full copyrighted text, or hidden persistence.
- Default path: `skills/effective-interact/artifacts/session-ledgers/<task-slug>.jsonl`.

items.label: Checkpoint
items.detail: Record milestone, current state, and next action after meaningful work changes.

items.label: Tool result
items.detail: Record tool-result status, command or file anchor, and a short factual summary.

items.label: Handoff source
items.detail: Before HTML generation, map ledger facts into claims, evidence, verification, timeline, and data-table sections.

sections.title: Fact preservation map
sections.content:
graph LR
  A[Long task checkpoint] --> B[Session ledger JSONL]
  C[Tool result summary] --> B
  D[Verification result] --> B
  B --> E[Claims]
  B --> F[Evidence]
  B --> G[Timeline]
  B --> H[HTML report]

sections.title: Ledger entry contract
sections.summary: Each row is a compact fact, not a transcript dump.

rows.keep: tool/command, status, summary, path or line anchor
rows.avoid: raw large logs, full command output, secrets

rows.keep: facts that must feed the final report

sections.title: Example JSONL entry
sections.content: {"ts":"2026-05-21T20:45:00+08:00","kind":"tool-result","status":"pass","summary":"Focused effective-interact tests passed.","source":{"tool":"shell_command","command":"bun test ./tests/effectiveInteractSkill.test.ts"},"evidence":["102 tests passed"],"next":["Generate the durable report fixture."]}

verification.label: Schema boundary
verification.detail: session-ledger-schema.json requires ts, kind, and summary, and disallows additional properties.

verification.label: Routing evals
verification.detail: routing-cases.json includes a positive long-task ledger case and a forbidden one-command ledger case.

nextActions: Create a ledger only when long-task facts would otherwise drift.
Use ledger facts as report inputs, then still cite commands, files, or assumptions.
